d: Russian revolutionary, politician, and political theorist. Leader of the Bolshevik Party and the October Revolution of 1917. Founded the Soviet Union and developed Leninism as a variant of Marxism.

j.title: Karl Marx: A Brief Biographical Sketch With an Exposition of Marxism
The Three Sources and Three Component Parts of Marxism
What Is To Be Done? Burning Questions of our Movement
One Step Forward, Two Steps Back (The Crisis in Our Party)
Two Tactics of Social-Democracy in the Democratic Revolution
Imperialism, the Highest Stage of Capitalism
The Proletarian Revolution and the Renegade Kautsky

subjects.name: Against Revisionism, in Defence of Marxism

s: vladimir lenin bolsheviks russian revolutionary, politician, and political theorist. leader of the bolshevik party and the october revolution of 1917. founded the soviet union and developed leninism as a variant of marxism. against revisionism, in defence of marxism lenin's last works on democracy and dictatorship on literature and art on philosophy on youth on the emancipation of women on the national question karl marx: a brief biographical sketch with an exposition of marxism the three sources and three component parts of marxism what is to be done? burning questions of our movement one step forward, two steps back (the crisis in our party) two tactics of social-democracy in the democratic revolution imperialism, the highest stage of capitalism the state and revolution the april theses the proletarian revolution and the renegade kautsky left-wing communism: an infantile disorder the tax in kind better fewer, but better
